title: Crystalix
description: Adds a bunch of colored glass blocks with many different functions
body:
## Information

***

## The Crystalix Wand

The Wand allows you to cycle through all possible properties the config window to set the property of a block.

*   **Crouching** will let you edit all connecting blocks at once
*   **CTRL** will make it so you only apply properties but not color
*   **X** will copy the properties from the block you're currently targeting onto the wand
*   You can open the config window by holding **V** by default
*   **Left Clicking** or **Scrolling Down** will cycle forwards, **Right Clicking** or **Scrolling Up** cycles backwards  
      
    ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1187033/description_ccb32fba-c39e-43e7-8c7e-9a34c5d02c0b.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1187033/description_b01ad4e6-c88b-4f3e-be20-cab9d8b5f80a.png)

***

## Blocks

Unlike previous versions, the block variaty was cut down dramatically, since **2.3.0** there's only **3** different versions of glass _what do you mean the first one is basically invisible_. You can apply any color to any type of glass to have an infinity combination of colors

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1187033/description_9d585023-9b3c-4460-adae-a8618c7fce2c.png)

***

## Properties

*   Properties can be mixed and matches however you want

### Invisibility

*   Makes the block invisible (What did you expect)
*   Useful if you want the properties of the glass without having a visual block there

### Transparent

*   With this toggled the texture of the glass will be fully transparent and color will only be applied to the few specs on the glass

### Waterloggable

*   Sets whether the block can be waterlogged or not

### Reinforced

*   Completly indestructible to everything, including wither and ender dragon, except for the player mining it
*   Makes the block 10x harder to mine

### Shadeless

*   Removes the shadows and shade from the block

### Redstone

*   Makes the block emit a redstone signal of 15

### Conductor

*   Makes the block conduct redstone through it like a solid block

### Ghost

*   Makes the block passthough for one of the following  
    *   Nothing
    *   Everything
    *   Only Players
    *   Everything except Players
    *   Only Hostile Mobs
    *   Everything except Hostile Mobs
    *   Only Passive Mobs
    *   Everything except Passive Mobs

### Light

*   Cycles through the following modes
    *   None: No special property
    *   Light: Glows at a light level of 15
    *   Dark: Blocks light the same way as tinted glass
    *   Fake Light: Glows with a light level of 15, still allowing for mobs to spawn

### Color

*   Opens the color picker screen which lets you choose any color you like to apply to your glass  
      
    ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1187033/description_c65b266e-8e96-44cc-ba2c-ba75dfc3f78a.png)
